name: Korean Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together.
2. Marinate for at least 1/2 hour or overnight at maximum.
3. Baste meat with marinade while cooking.
This is enough marinade for approximately 2 lbs of meat. It can be used on beef, ribs, chicken, etc. My preference is on beef short ribs or a good porterhouse steak.
Toasted sesame seeds are usually found in the ethnic section of any supermarket or in a Chinese market.
